tagline: Runs title search, escrow and closing — a licensed officer signs the insurable title and authorizes the wire.
problem: Title search, curative and escrow coordination are labor-heavy checklists — and an escrow disbursement is an irreversible wire, the #1 target for business-email-compromise fraud.
outcome: The title commitment and closing package are assembled straight-through with standard exceptions cleared; the licensed officer signs the insurable-title decision and authorizes disbursement.

steps.does: Open the file and pull title, recording, tax and HOA data
Assemble the commitment, send docs for signature, and run the closing checklist
Clear standard exceptions; verify the payoff and wire instructions out-of-band
A licensed title/escrow officer signs the insurable title and authorizes the wire
Disburse escrow funds and record the deed / mortgage
Issue the policy and reconcile the escrow ledger
